title: dalea vulneraria var. typica
intro: Dalea vulneraria var. typica, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial legume native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of dalea vulneraria var. typica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically as a poultice to treat skin irritations and wounds.
